If you’re gonna make a cash grab, just say it. 30$ ban hammer, 100$ kick hammer, 20$ mod menu, 10$ bonk hammer, and typing a review doesn’t even give you a “free mod menu”, so kids are begging to know how to get their free mod menu. reviews.review_title: needs to be more like the original
reviews.review_description: it's decent. my only issues with it is that its kinda buggy, doesn't have credit for stella or xera, and isn't enough like the version xera has on itch .io. if the bugs were fixed and it was more like the original and didnt have like 7 microtransactions, then i'd rate it 5 stars.

complete copy of the real ear game on itch(.)io just with insanely expensive "mods" (kick hammer, ban hammer, menus fling hammer, etc.) that dont even work. the kick hammer is $100 usd and it most likely doesnt work (like the ban hammer.) its a fun game other than that, but the entire thing is just stolen and a cashgrab

I like the game alot! Though there's some things that kinda annoy me and are bit glitchy....1: when you grab one of those guns that you can buy and you don't own them you kinda have a chance of glitching through walls and floors..happened 3 times cause I got bored!:D 2: this is a bit of an abusive power but that ban hammer that doesn't actually ban people...people who own have been "banning" if i can even call it thathave been using the hammer on people who have been doing nothing!  I experienced it...though overall its a good game!

reviews.review_title: Wow, what a great Gorilla Tag game
reviews.review_description:
This is basically gorilla tag with horror and legs. Is it such a good game? I really like it in my opinion so I feel like everyone who hasn’t heard it should download the game. It’s really really really fun. 
￼

Could you please add more skin colors and more cosmetic items to the game? Also, could you make it so that when you enter the game, the message “Welcome to Ear Game!” appears and the song “Tophats N’ Tools - Solar.mp3 (ChimpLab VR OST)” plays? Please fix the bug with the leaderboard, as players aren't showing up there. Please make it possible to create your own room. Please make it possible to mute any player in the game. Please fix the error in the section where you're supposed to enter your nickname, since it's currently impossible to enter one there. Add a quest cam/camera mod so that it's easy to record gameplay videos. Please fix the bug related to Level 2 in the game, because when I fall into a chasm or acid, I get stuck there and have to restart the game. Please remove all mod menus, as they greatly interfere with gameplay and allow monsters to be removed from the map, plus there are a lot of bugs in the mod menus. Thank you so much! I hope you’ll add all of this!
